parameters.query: SELECT * FROM utilisateurs WHERE token_session = '{{ $('Parse Parameters').first().json.token }}' AND actif = true AND token_expiration > NOW()

SELECT p.*, f.facture_num, f.magasin, f.date_facture, c.nom as client_nom, c.ville as client_ville FROM produits p LEFT JOIN factures f ON f.id = p.facture_id LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = f.client_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
